node.text: Jolene went to a yoga retreat with her partner where they experienced a peaceful environment with an amazing view during yoga at sunrise.

node.text: Jolene and her partner came across a waterfall oasis during a hike where she felt peaceful and worries disappeared.

node.text: Jolene finds peace and connection to nature and herself while doing yoga with beautiful backdrops.

node.text: Jolene finds inspiration in the small things and believes in continuous growth through obstacles.
Jolene plans to reconnect with nature again the following month.
